examples.text: where residue in clay pots has revealed that people were making an alcoholic beverage from fermented rice, millet, grapes, and honey. Within a few thousand years, cultures all over the world were fermenting their own drinks.

source.text: A brief history of alcohol - Rod Phillips

relations.reason: millet 是“黍、粟、小米”等谷类作物，属于 cereal 所涵盖的具体谷物类型。
